title: Canada–United States–Mexico Agreement - Application for trader/investor status (work permit) [IMM 5321] - Canada.ca

## Canada–United States–Mexico Agreement - Application for trader/investor status (work permit) [IMM 5321]
Canada–United States–Mexico Agreement - Application for trader/investor status
                    (work permit) [IMM 5321] (PDF, 2.3 MB)

### How to download, save and open this form
- Use your computer. The form may not open on tablets or mobile phones .
- Save the form on your computer in a place you can remember. For most Internet browsers, clicking on the link above will automatically download the form. If the form doesn’t automatically download, right-click on the link and select “Save as.”
- For most Internet browsers, clicking on the link above will automatically download the form.
- If the form doesn’t automatically download, right-click on the link and select “Save as.”
- After you download the form, open it using Adobe Acrobat Reader.

#### Open this form in Acrobat Reader
- Open Acrobat Reader. You need Acrobat Reader version 10 or higher to open our forms. Get the latest version of Acrobat Reader .
- You need Acrobat Reader version 10 or higher to open our forms.
- Get the latest version of Acrobat Reader .
- Select “ File ” from the top menu.
- Find the location where you saved the form, click on the file, and click “ Open. ”
